pi_items.source: setup_task.sh download script and rcsb.org API
Coordinate analysis of the downloaded 2LZM.pdb file showing ILE at residue 3 and CYS at residue 97
verifier.py minimum figure size scoring requirement
Geometric analysis of 2LZM.pdb CB atoms yielding an actual distance of 4.63 Å
Geometric analysis of 2LZM.pdb CB atoms yielding an actual distance of 4.63 Å

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real structural data for bacteriophage T4 lysozyme (PDB: 2LZM), downloaded directly from the RCSB Protein Data Bank. A geometric analysis of the 3D coordinates from the 2LZM PDB file confirms the exact presence of the target residues, Isoleucine 3 and Cysteine 97. The calculated Euclidean distance between the C-beta (CB) atoms of ILE 3 and CYS 97 is approximately 4.63 Å, which perfectly validates the metadata's expected bounding range of 4.2 to 4.8 Å. All output paths, result JSON locations, and figure size thresholds strictly correspond to the task's export and verifier scripts.
